description: move a user-approved proposal directory into skills/<name>/ (refuses to overwrite an existing skill)
rules: local filesystem move only — no remote service, no install
looks for the proposal under new-skills/<NAME> then composition-recipes/<NAME>
refuses to overwrite: exits non-zero (captured) if the target skills/<NAME> already exists or the proposal is not found
the captured promote result is written to record_store as promote.txt
usage: Set PROPOSED (the proposed/<ts> dir), SKILLS_DIR (target skills/ dir), NAME (skill to promote). Output: promote.txt.
limitation: Only moves a proposal that exists under PROPOSED; will not overwrite an existing skill of the same name. Mutates the local skills directory.
